data.body:
[1st Anniversary - OST Pack Pre-Order Notice]

We prepared Blue Archive's 1st Anniversary OST Pack for you, Sensei. Look forward to enjoying the fantastic music and merch of Blue Archive!

➡️Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/101750
➡️Official Youtube: https://youtu.be/L6U8n4tRgkg![OZUGQgyG8GXozsQEIITdgn1bW45OEo26.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/OZUGQgyG8GXozsQEIITdgn1bW45OEo26.jpg)
